prompt: Create a photorealistic vertical full-body fashion portrait of an adult woman with long dark wavy hair standing in a sleek high-rise glass corridor at night, viewed from behind at a slight three-quarter angle as she looks back toward the camera. She is positioned near the left glass wall with one hand resting on a metal railing, city lights and building windows visible through the reflective floor-to-ceiling windows. She wears a fitted black long-sleeve turtleneck, a short taupe pencil skirt, sheer black tights, and glossy black high heels; she holds a gray coat draped over one arm and a smartphone in her hand. Add a soft square blur over the face to anonymize the identity while keeping the pose and hair visible. The corridor should feel luxurious and cinematic, with dark polished marble floors, glossy black wall panels, strong reflections, overhead linear LED lights forming a bright diagonal line into the distance, and a green exit sign far in the background. Use moody warm low-light photography, shallow depth of field, subtle haze, realistic skin and fabric texture, natural lens distortion, soft bloom on lights, and a candid upscale nighttime atmosphere. Shot on a full-frame camera with an 85mm lens look, vertical 9:16 composition, subject centered slightly left, no text, no watermark.
